2176710.name: MEAT 2: Absolute Zero
2176710.description:
M.E.A.T. II: Absolute Zero (MEAT 2) is a brutal, fast-paced boomer shooter where death doesn’t punish you, it teaches you.

Sir Duncan Culligan fears neither blood-soaked walls, grotesque mutants with their organs spilling out, nor death itself. The game throws you straight into chaos and demonic carnage, where your only goal is to conquer the hell created by the occult MBSXII Sect.

M.E.A.T. II is a classic FPS inspired by iconic shooters of the past, enhanced with a modern movement system, powerful special abilities, and relentless combat pace. The world is drenched in dark horror atmosphere, gore, brutal enemies, and absolutely no mercy.

GAMEPLAY (EARLY ACCESS)

  • Classic boomer shooter FPS with modern mechanics

  • Fast, aggressive combat under constant enemy pressure

  • 6 full story chapters available in Early Access

  • 6 intense boss fights, each with unique mechanics

  • Additional arena / challenge mode

  • No hand-holding, skill matters

SPECIAL ABILITIES

Master devastating powers to survive against the MBSXII Sect:

  • Fire mutant flesh from the inside

  • Weapon-specific special abilities (including an Ice Revolver, Black Hole shot, and even a BDF pickaxe that plays music?)

  • Freeze and slow time with Absolute Zero

  • Dash and double jump

  • Tear enemies apart or kick them into other mutants

Combat is fast, aggressive, and unforgiving.

You will die.
You will learn.
You will play better.

BRUTALITY & CHALLENGE

Enemies will not let you pass until they are destroyed. Mistakes are punished instantly.

Blood covers walls and floors. Limbs fly through the air. Mutants scream and explode.

M.E.A.T. II is made for players who embrace challenge.

Face grotesque mutants, twisted abominations, and the occult MBSXII Sect.

STORY & SERIES CONTINUATION

M.E.A.T. II: Absolute Zero is a direct continuation of the original M.E.A.T. RPG.
This time, the story is told through brutal first-person FPS gameplay.

Once again step into the boots of Sir Duncan H. Culligan, a man broken by tragedy, epidemic, and the collapse of a 19th-century Canadian mining town. Death of loved ones and spreading evil are only the beginning.

The occult MBSXII Sect, using a mysterious substance known as Rock Resin (Telestarion), is preparing a catastrophe far greater than a local apocalypse. Culligan must confront the architects of humanity’s worst nightmares and uncover the true origin of Telestarion - a substance now flowing through his own veins.

This time, the story isn’t told with words... It’s delivered with pure telestarion powered lead.

ATMOSPHERE & VOICE ACTING

  • Dark horror atmosphere with black humor

  • Retro pixel-art 2D visuals combined with 3D environments and modern effects

  • Aggressive, high-energy soundtrack composed by Brainfreezer

  • Voice acting:
    Skits (DOPE D.O.D.) English version
    SŁOŃ (Brain Dead Familia) Polish version

EARLY ACCESS CONTENT

M.E.A.T. II: Absolute Zero is fully playable in Early Access and already represents the game’s core vision.

Currently available:

  • 6 story maps

  • 6 boss fights

  • Additional challenge mode

  • Full ability system

We plan to continue expanding the game, adding new content and refining balance based on player feedback.

READY TO DIE?

Buy M.E.A.T. II: Absolute Zero and prepare for a brutal, fast-paced shooter in true old-school style.
